_note: User mentioned the business's IG account in their Story. Arrives as a 'messages' event with attachments[0].type: 'story_mention'. The CDN URL (attachments[0].payload.url) is ephemeral — it expires in ~24 hours and cannot be re-fetched after the Story expires. Download and store it immediately on receipt. No API call can retrieve a story mention URL after it expires. The sender's story is NOT visible to the page unless the account is public.
